name: Barbell Upright Row
setup: Grip bar with hands hip-width apart (overhand)
Bar at thigh level, arms extended
execution: Pull bar up along body, leading with elbows
Pull to upper chest / clavicle height
common_mistakes: Grip too narrow (wrist and shoulder strain)
cues: Pull to upper chest, not chin
shoulder_safety_note: Avoid internal rotation at top. Many lifters should substitute face pulls or lateral raises.
